originalTitle: The Extra Reward for Owning Stocks Over Bonds Has Disappeared
summary: There is little sign of crimped demand for equities among individual investors, who remain bullish after two years of blockbuster gains.
content: There is little sign of crimped demand for equities among individual investors, who remain bullish after two years of blockbuster gains.
chineseTitle: 持有股票相对于债券的额外回报已经消失
chineseSummary: 个人投资者对股票的需求几乎没有受到抑制的迹象，在经历了两年的大幅上涨后，他们仍然看涨。
chineseContent: 个人投资者对股票的需求几乎没有受到抑制的迹象，在经历了两年的大幅上涨后，他们仍然看涨。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
